resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def minimizedStringLength(self, s: str) -> int:
        return len(set(s))```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Any character can be removed except one occurrence of each distinct character; thus the minimal length equals the count of unique characters.
